raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is experiencing a mental health crisis that necessitates significant action.",
    "The proposed mental health bill package aims to stabilize and strengthen communities in California.",
    "AB 1451 would require health care service plans and insurance policies to cover treatment for behavioral health crises identified during medical appointments starting January 1, 2024.",
    "Under AB 1451, treatment for a behavioral health crisis can be provided at contracted facilities if they have appropriate staff available.",
    "AB 1451 mandates the provision of treatment without preauthorization for behavioral health crises.",
    "AB 1450 requires all schools in California to conduct universal screenings for Adverse Childhood Experiences (ACEs) and mental health assessments.",
    "AB 1450 mandates that schools must have a full-time mental health clinician and case manager to support students.",
    "The revenues from a proposed $0.05 tax on candy distribution in California would be allocated to the Mental Health Services Fund.",
    "The proposed mental health bill package has the potential to transform the approach to mental health care in California."
  ]
}
```
